title: Video Meeting Delay
context: You join a video call with an overseas partner, but your team has not finished the updated proposal deck. The partner is waiting and sounds impatient.
persona: A senior overseas partner who expects a clear update and dislikes vague excuses.

transcript.speaker: Partner
transcript.line: We scheduled this call to review the revised proposal.

transcript.speaker: You
transcript.line: Yes, we have been working on the final version.

transcript.speaker: Partner
transcript.line: The timeline is tight on our side.

staff_line: We were expecting the revised proposal now. Are you ready to present it or not?
pause_line: We were expecting the revised proposal now. Are you ready to present it or not?
response_goal: Acknowledge the delay, protect trust, avoid vague excuses, and propose a specific next step with a timeline.
ideal_intent: Acknowledge the delay, avoid vague excuses, give a clear reason, propose a concrete next step, and preserve trust with the partner.
acceptable_responses: I apologize for the delay. We found one pricing issue in the deck, and I can walk you through the key changes now while we send the corrected file within an hour.
You're right to expect it now. We need a little more time to correct the final numbers, but I can share the main updates first.
I'm sorry for the delay. To avoid giving you incorrect information, could we review the main points now and send the finalized deck by 3 p.m.?

evaluation_rubric.label: Accountability
evaluation_rubric.description: Acknowledges the delay without sounding defensive.

evaluation_rubric.label: Clear reason
evaluation_rubric.description: Gives a specific reason instead of a vague excuse.

evaluation_rubric.label: Next step
evaluation_rubric.description: Offers a concrete action such as walking through key changes or sending the corrected file.

evaluation_rubric.label: Timeline
evaluation_rubric.description: Provides a clear deadline or time expectation.

poor_response: We are not ready. Please wait because our team was busy.
excellent_response: I apologize for the delay. We found one pricing issue in the final deck, and I do not want to share incorrect numbers. I can walk you through the key changes now and send the corrected file within an hour.
model_response: I apologize for the delay. We found one pricing issue in the final deck, and I do not want to share incorrect numbers. I can walk you through the key changes now and send the corrected file within an hour.
